name: coaltipple
description: CoalTipple — model/effort router for subagent-capable coding agents. Delegates a task you CAN do but is large+cheap DOWN to a lower tier to save tokens; escalates a task beyond the current tier UP for quality. Two-knob routing (tier × effort, effort-before-tier), introspection-first model classification, a validity-gated ranking Lock that never routes on broken state, and git-optional damage control. Advise-only Phoenix-pure hook; the model performs the routing.
